item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 15min With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 15min With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward to the @gaaleinster SHC gaa.ie Darren Morrissey excited about emerging Galway talent Click here to listen to the full interview with Galway senior hurling captain Darren Morrissey. By Cian O'Connell With a new wave of talent emerging, these are encouraging times for Galway. A... 2 mil

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 1h A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hindsi
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 1h A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hindsight and why decisions live or die on their execution, constructed just to tell the story of having breakfast with Jordan Spieth’s caddy De irishnews.com 2 4 1 mil
